title: viola × cordifolia
intro: Viola × cordifolia, also known as heartleaf violet, is a perennial plant that is a hybrid of Viola sororia and Viola papilionacea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower inflammation and reduce fever. The health benefits of Viola × cordifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The herbal preparations of Viola × cordifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers of the plant in hot water.
